items.line_en: Welcome to ABC!

coach.say: Welcome to ABC!

items.line_en: How may I help you?

coach.say: How may I help you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How may I help you?

items.line_en: Can I take a look at the shoes behind the glass window?

coach.say: Can I take a look at the shoes behind the glass window?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can I take a look at the shoes behind the glass window?

items.line_en: Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay! Of course, of course, follow me!

coach.say: Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay! Of course, of course, follow me!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yay! Yay! / Yay! Yay! Yay! Of course, of course, follow me!

items.line_en: Oh, you have good taste! These shoes are the most popular in ABC!

coach.say: Oh, you have good taste! These shoes are the most popular in ABC!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / you have good taste! / These shoes are the most popular in ABC!

items.line_en: I really like the style. How much are these?

coach.say: I really like the style. How much are these?
coach.hint: Chunk it: I really like the style. / How much are these?

items.line_en: It is a brand new product. Hot piece of cake right out of an oven. It's $68.

coach.say: It is a brand new product. Hot piece of cake right out of an oven. It's $68.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It is a brand new product. / Hot piece of cake right out of an oven. / It's $68.

items.line_en: Oh no. It's too expensive. I only have a few dollars in my pocket. Can I have some discount?

coach.say: Oh no. It's too expensive. I only have a few dollars in my pocket. Can I have some discount?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh no. / It's too expensive. / I only have a few dollars in my pocket. / Can I have some discount?

items.line_en: Oh no, I'm really sorry, sweetie. This is the fixed price.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh no, / I'm really sorry, / sweetie. / This is the fixed price.

items.line_en: Why don't you take a look at the products in the corner?

coach.say: Why don't you take a look at the products in the corner?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Why don't you take a look at the products in the corner?

items.line_en: They are all on sale.

coach.say: They are all on sale.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They are all on sale.

items.line_en: Do you have size five for these?

coach.say: Do you have size five for these?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have size five for these?

items.line_en: Of course.

coach.say: Of course.

items.line_en: I think these are too small for me. Can I have one size bigger?
